purpose: Pre-register a broad but bounded universe of research-only shadow candidates to increase live observation density without promoting them to active memories or panel events.

candidate_policy.initial_scope: H1_NATIVE_CONTEXT_FIRST; M15 candidate universe intentionally deferred until M15 price-anchor/closed-bar outcome hooks are made explicit.

rule_language.near_miss_policy: A row is a near-miss when the context surface is available and data is OK, but only a small number of predeclared clauses fail. Near-miss is never an event and never a signal.

candidates.observation_reference_price_policy: closed H1 context h1_close; observation-only, not entry
candidates.rationale: First closed H1 of a liquid session moves bullish while higher timeframe context is not directly bearish.
candidates.forbidden_interpretation: Not a signal, not a trade setup authorization, not entry/stop/target, not probability, not profitability, not broker/execution.
